emails.subject: New Books for NETCO
emails.body: New Books for NETCO Hi Kam, Per your request, the books have been created in GCP, and the CP ID's are on the attached spreadsheets. Please let us know if you need anything further. Cheryl x33103

emails.subject: RE: New Books for NETCO
emails.body: RE: New Books for NETCO Cheryl, Thanks for taking care of these so quickly. I have reattached the central book request with some additional books. The blue highlighted "Cent" books were on the original request but were labeled as "FB" and should have been PB as the book name. I assume you did nothing with those books because there was no id next to it. Is that correct? I corrected them and also added two new books at the bottom. Thanks again, Kam x3-5781

emails.subject: FW: New Books for NETCO
emails.body: FW: New Books for NETCO Sorry, I forgot to attach the spreadsheet.
